title: USGS Minerals Yearbook — The Mineral Industry of Turkey (Volume III, Area Reports: International), comparator to Iran coverage
source_org: U.S. Geological Survey, National Minerals Information Center
download_url: https://pubs.usgs.gov/myb/vol3/{year}/myb3-{year}-turkey.pdf (and .xlsx) — see files list for exact per-year URLs

files.name: myb3-2020-21-Turkey-advrel.xlsx
files.type: tables-only advance-release (XLSX, no full narrative PDF published)

files.name: myb3-2022-Turkey-ert.xlsx
files.type: tables-only advance-release (XLSX, no full narrative PDF published)

frequency: annual (some years combined into biennial reports)
units: metric tons / other units as described per-table in each file
notes: Comparator dataset to usgs-minerals-yearbook/irn/. Unlike Iran, Saudi Arabia and Russia, USGS did NOT publish a full narrative PDF report for Turkey beyond 2019 — only 'tables-only advance release' XLSX files exist for 2020-21 and 2022 (no 2023 at all). Confirmed by full DOM link extraction from https://www.usgs.gov/centers/national-minerals-information-center/turkey — no myb3-2020-21-turkey.pdf, myb3-2022-turkey.pdf, or any 2023 link exists on the page. All files verified genuine PDF/Excel via `file`.

failures.attempted: myb3-2020-21-turkey.pdf / myb3-2022-turkey.pdf / any 2023-turkey file (full narrative report and any 2023 data)
failures.reason: not published by USGS — confirmed absent from official country page link list, not merely a fetch failure
